race.comment: TOUSLED CROWN (2) was below her best last time out when eighth over 1600m at this track. Nicely placed and capable of far better. ANOTHER NEPHEW (3) found the frame when having his first start on a dirt track last time out, beaten 0.9 lengths into second over 1400m at this track. Sound run last time and will be hard to beat. HUNDRED YARDS (7) travelled in a rearwards position then made some inroads and finished 6 lengths away in fifth last time out over 1400m at this track three weeks ago. Tackles a longer journey this time. Can play a big role. WHISPERING PHARAOH (6) showed good early speed last start over today's journey at this track before finishing second, beaten 3 lengths. Ready to go one better. KERMELIA (8) is third-up now and can't be left out of calculations.
